admin_assumptions.assumption: DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on Registry is held by a trusted EOA or multisig
admin_assumptions.risk: Admin can update implementation address for future Chamber deployments

admin_assumptions.assumption: Chamber upgrade path requires multisig quorum via executeTransaction → upgradeImplementation
admin_assumptions.risk: If board becomes inoperable (empty), upgrade is permanently blocked

trust_boundaries.trust: Trusted by Chamber — ownerOf is called with try/catch but result accepted as authoritative
trust_boundaries.attack_surface: Malicious NFT could re-enter during delegate(); EIP-1271 callback path in _isDirector

trust_boundaries.trust: Trusted by Chamber (ERC-4626); SafeERC20 not used — standard ERC-20 assumed
trust_boundaries.attack_surface: Fee-on-transfer or rebasing tokens would cause accounting errors in ERC-4626

trust_boundaries.trust: Policy is untrusted — any address can be set as policy by Agent owner
trust_boundaries.attack_surface: Malicious policy could return false to block governance, or true for all to rubberstamp
Agent owner can call any contract including Chamber, bypassing policy
